response.justification: Aisha brings extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest — aligning well with the role’s core stack and responsibilities, though limited evidence of Nest.js and Kubernetes in production contexts and basic German may pose minor hurdles.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven experience in AI-agent systems and developer tooling
Strong testing culture and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in work history
Limited evidence of Kubernetes in production environments
Basic German may impact collaboration in Berlin-based team
